# Disintegration: the mirror of the global economy {#sec-ch09}

> *Deglobalisation — and how the cracking of the core empowered the periphery.*

::: {.callout-note}
## Draft pending
**Period:** 1914–1945. This chapter is a stub. Draft it from the standardized template
(`_chapter-template.qmd`) using its story spine
(`teaching/ecu4413_world_econ/module_design/topic_09_story_spine_2026-06-20.md`), the matching topic brief, the
centre-of-gravity ledger, the data compendium, and `datasets_by_topic.md`.
:::
